added: 24-hour uptime bars on device list — live percentage and color-coded bar per device
SMTP email alerts — get notified the moment a device goes down or comes back up
Ping-only device types: UPS, HVAC, camera, printer, internet — SSH disabled automatically
CSV import now supports all ping-only vendor types
Team member roles: owner, admin, viewer with per-site access control
Live View Link — shareable read-only dashboard URL for non-members
fixed: CSV import validation rejected valid ping-only vendor names
Device status badge showed stale data after maintenance mode was toggled
changed: Dashboard header redesigned — site name, agent health (CPU/RAM/Temp), and tab bar now match the real layout
Status labels simplified to UP / DOWN / MAINTENANCE for consistency

added: Automated SSH config pull — weekly backup of running-config per device
Config change detection — alerts when a device's running-config hash changes
Maintenance mode — suppress alerts for devices undergoing planned work
SSH error reporting — last_ssh_error and last_ssh_at tracked per device
Delete device endpoint for removing stale or decommissioned entries
fixed: Devices with no recent heartbeat incorrectly showed as UP instead of unknown
Config backup rejected valid Cisco configs containing extended show headers
changed: Agent heartbeat interval reduced from 10 minutes to 5 minutes
Ping timeout increased from 1s to 2s to reduce false-down alerts on slow links

added: ICMP ping monitoring for all configured devices — up/down status updates every 60 seconds
SSH config backup for Cisco IOS, Aruba CX, Juniper, and generic SSH-capable devices
Agent heartbeat with CPU, RAM, and temperature metrics — Raspberry Pi thermal sensor supported
Automatic device list sync — agent fetches devices from the cloud, no manual re-entry needed
CSV bulk import and export — load your full device inventory from a spreadsheet
Alert history stored in the cloud — survives agent restarts and hardware changes
Docker image published to Docker Hub for Raspberry Pi arm64 and x86 amd64
Automated Docker image builds via GitHub Actions on every agent code change
Read-only share link — generate a view-only URL for teammates without a dashboard login
